game.short_text: A game for Kenney's game jam 2021
game.title: RotoRope

details.title: RotoRope
details.description:
Controls: Only use mouse. Press and hold mouse click to use the rope. Roll the mouse around the ball to roll the rope (do not release button while doing this).  R to restart.
Your goal is to go to the doors to advance next level.
Theme: Rotation
Assets: Kenney's assets.
Game design & SFX & programming: ural89
Music: Parker Walker
RotoRope is a game for Kenney's Game Jam 2021.

game.short_text: Fight the waves of ennemies coming at you. Your only weapon, you orbiting bullets.
game.title: Orbital Defense

details.title: Orbital Defense
details.description:
Fight the waves of ennemies coming at you. Your only weapon, you bullets that you can control only by orbiting them around. After each wave you gain a power up.
Move your bullet :
right/left arrow
a/d for qwerty
q/d for azerty
space for special
p for pause

Last boss is a bit visually bugged, the orbiting ennemies disappear after a while, you can still kill him.
He's a bit long to kill too ^^.
Thanks for playing!

CreditsSprites, Sounds & Fonts by Kenney
Music by Wavecont, https://www.wavecont.com/free-download
Video Link: https://youtu.be/GCCgkgKvgXg

game.short_text: Use your damaged ship to kill as many enemies as you can.
game.title: Stranded

details.title: Stranded
details.description:
This game was made in 48h for the Kenney Game Jam 2021 with the theme "Rotation" using only Kenney's visual assets.

This is the end...
Your whole squad is dead.
Your left thruster is busted, sending you spinning endlessly, in the cold darkness of space.
The Imperial fleet is closing up on you to finish the job; and your blasters are offline...
But you won't go quietly...
Your tractor beam is still operational. It is too weak to affect their ships, but you're in the middle of an asteroid field.
You will smash as many of their ships as you can ! They will follow you in death !
FOR THE REPUBLIC !







Sprites, Sounds & Fonts by Kenney
Musics : 
"Tyrant" by Kevin MacLeod
"Beauty Flow" by Kevin MacLeod

game.short_text: Walk and Rotation!!
game.title: Wall Walker

details.title: Wall Walker
details.description:
This game was created for Kenney Game Jam 2021. All assets are from kenney.nl!!
How to play
Walk to left  : Left arrow key or [A] keyWalk to right : Right arrow key or [D] keyRetry stage : [R] key
When you walk towards a wall or a cliff, the world spins and becomes the ground there.
Get the key and open the door.
Blocks will fall in the direction of gravity.
Be careful not to get stuck in the spikes or get crushed by the blocks.
Good luck!!
Ver0.8.1(31 Aug 2021) Fixed the problem of not rotating. / Add retry key.

game.short_text: Operate wormhole machinery to prevent enemies entering the portal
game.title: Wormhole Machinery Operator

details.title: Wormhole Machinery Operator
details.description:
Welcome, Operator #008
Your mission is to operate wormhole machinery to prevent spies (yellow aliens) from entering the teleport, but also keep the new employees alive (teal/green aliens). To play you only need a mouse (or finger and a touch device) - try to rotate the highlighted gears to manage the gates and platforms.
Early game prototype made in ~24hrs, thus the game consists only of four playable levels. If you encounter any game breaking bugs, please let me know.
Game made for Kenney Jam 2021 - Rotation -https://itch.io/jam/kenney-jam-2021
Credits:Programming - Konrad Nowakowski (me)Graphics and Sound Effects - KenneyMusic - Children's March Theme by Cleyton Kauffman
Thanks for checking my game!

game.short_text: Now with more levels! More cars! And even fewer brakes! Oops!
game.title: Oops! No Brakes

details.title: Oops! No Brakes
details.description:
Oops! No Brakes 
 More Oops! Update 




Oops! No Brakes is a non-stop racing obstacle course! Get to the flag at the end of each level! Sounds easy, but these cars don't have brakes! Collect coins and go for the fastest time you can manage! No brakes? No problem!

The More Oops! Update includes two new environments including the "Gloopy Grotto" and the "Spicy Shore"! You can skip to any environment from the beginning. There's also two new cars, a new soundtrack, numerous bug-fixes, and all the non-stop driving you can handle!

Controls:
  Mouse - Rotate the car 
 R - Retry the level  
New Mobile Port!
Want to barrel into the sea or defy death over lava from anywhere? Oops! No Brakes! is now available to download from the Google Play store for FREE! Download it here:


Programming and Design by TheJaspel (https://twitter.com/thejaspel1)
Music by Zachary Pinkham (https://soundcloud.com/zachary-pinkham)
Originally made for the Kenney Jam 2021 - Theme: Rotation

game.short_text: Ride the space elevator as far as you can! Use arrow keys or A and D
game.title: Spaaaace Elevator

details.title: Spaaaace Elevator
details.description:
use ARROW KEYS or A and D to control!
My first jam game, but also a first for procedural level generation and recycling game objects from a pool to create a resource-light endless runner.Nerdy detail: the center column rotates using a sine function with y-world-axis-driven offsets for the individual pieces.You rotate around the center of the space elevator.Segments are rotated back into view as they fly past you.Enemies and obstacles rotate around the center column.Everything rotates because Spaaaaaaace. ;)

game.short_text: Retarget lasers to escape from Mars!
game.title: Laser Launch

details.title: Laser Launch
details.description:
Created in 48 hours for Kenney Jam 2021. Theme: Rotation 
Result: 2nd Place!
(If you're getting audio glitches, try switching to low quality mode, muting the audio or playing the PC build).

Rotate the radar dishes to retarget lasers and escape Mars! 

Hover the mouse over a radar and 
- hold or press left click to turn it anti-clockwise 
- hold or press right click to turn it clockwise.

If you get stuck, you can press 's' to skip the current level.

game.short_text: A mysterious world waiting for Ben to explore...
game.title: UnderWorld

details.title: UnderWorld
details.description:
Made for Kenney Jam 2021 - Theme "Rotation"


## Plot
One day, Ben is out adventuring the world.....
He found his way into a mysterious land.
A voice echo around him.....
"Ben, find the monument"
## Gameplay Instruction
- Remember your path
Memorize the path shown on the may.
- Plan your path
Use mouse left button to click on the tile to plan Ben's next move.
Click the "Start Actions" button when finishing planning.
RULE: Can only click the adjacent tile and can't click the tile planned.
- Way Ben go
See Ben trace the path you planned for him and found out where it leads him to!

## How to break the game?
Well, that's easy! We haven't done any much playtesting yet, but this is the only one we've found:
You can start the actions without adding any moves, Ben will idle forever..... until you refresh the page.

## Interested in how the game was made?
You can clone the repository here: https://github.com/Dusti-Mili/Kenney-Jam-2021
But be ready to see tons of last-minute hardcoded scripts!
The programmer is certainly not happy and has smashed two of his keyboard already, but hey, it's game jam! 



Hope you enjoy "Underworld", pleaseleave a comment down below if you enjoyed it. It would mean a lot for us!! : ) 
Check out other works from the artist -> Battle Bunny - Alvin Ding
Check out other works from the programmer -> Norris Wu

game.short_text: PANCAR - Game for the Kenney Jam 2021
game.title: PANCAR - Kenney Jam 2021

details.title: PANCAR - Kenney Jam 2021
details.description:
Welcome to PANCAR™ the premier breakfast racing league!
Put your culinary cruising skills to the test and see how many laps you can complete without ruining your breakfast. 
How to play
Press the number keys (1, 2, 3, 4) on your keyboard in order, to jump.Time your jump just right to leap over the bacon strips. 
Made in 48 hours by me, for the Kenney Jam 2021. The theme was 'Rotation'.I interpreted 'rotation' as a sequence, you have to 'rotate' through the sequence in order to jump over the bacon and succesfully complete a lap/rotation around the pan.

game.short_text: A relaxing calm strategy game about aligning hexes through rotation.
game.title: Twirly Worldy

details.title: Twirly Worldy
details.description:
A relaxing strategy game about rotating hexes into the most advantageous positions.
You have a limited amount of moves to either place down hexes on grass tiles, or rotate around the terrain. Try your best to get as many points as possible through various synergies explained below (or in game of course).
Controls: Very simple. 
    Simply left-click where you want to place or rotate hexes.
    Hold down Right-click and move your mouse to rotate the camera.
    Scroll-wheel to zoom in or out.
    Escape to either return to main menu or restart the game.

Hexes: 

    Mine:  1 point per adjacent mountain or rocky terrain
    Smelter:  3 point per adjacent mine
    Village:  1 point for each adjacent building of any kind
    Castle:  8 points if surrounded by 4 or more villages
    Field:  2 points per adjacent water
    Mill:  1 point per adjacent field of wheat
    Sheep:  1 point per adjacent sheep or field tile
    Tower:  1 point per adjacent empty grass or water tile
    Dock:  10 points if adjacent to at least 3 water tiles

Game Created for Kenney Jam 2021, using the Unity game engine.

game.short_text: Prop Hunt meets Where's Waldo
game.title: Alien Hunt

details.title: Alien Hunt
details.description:
Story
You play as a soldier who is trained to hunt down aliens. But these aliens aren't simply going to reveal themselves in their green suit. They disguised themselves as everyday, regular objects. It's up to you to track these aliens down and annihilate them from the face of the earth, before it's too late!!
Gameplay
The game plays as a mix between Prop Hunt and Where's Waldo. It features a total of 20 levels across 2 unique locations. You use the keyboard to control the camera and try to get the right angle in order to see in each little nook and cranny of the map. Once you've spotted your target, you can use the mouse to identify them as an alien and blast them away.
Controls
Use W/S to zoom the camera in and outUse A/D to rotate the camera left and rightUse E/Q to pan the camera up and downUse the left mouse button to select aliens
Credits
This was a part of the Kenney 2021 Game Jam and as per the rules, all of the assets have been from various packs released by Kenney over the years. The only exception to this rule have been the music and a couple of sound effects that I simply couldn't find amongst the packs. Besides that everything has been made by me, WittyAdrian.

moreInfo.Author: WittyWare
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Aliens, Casual, Funny, Low-poly, Relaxing, Short, Singleplayer, Unity

details.title: Spin the World
details.description:
[Spin the World]
Help the bunny get to the goal by spinning the world.
For Kenney Jam 2021 (Theme: Rotation)
[Objective]: Get to the goal  to complete the level.[Controls]: Using the mouse, left-click and drag to rotate the world.
The bunny will always try to walk forward and will turn around if he encounters a wall.Collect the key  to unlock blocks with keyholes Collect the gem  to get 100% completion for the level

game.short_text: Cook quickly on a supersized Lazy Susan!
game.title: Cooking 'round the Clock

details.title: Cooking 'round the Clock
details.description:
Welcome to Cooking 'round the Clock!
Grab your controller and get ready to roll out some dishes!
Made for the Kenney Jam 2021
❓How To:
Rotate the Lazy Susan with the gamepad triggersActivate chefs with XYAB (corresponding to the location of the chef)The TOP chef places ingredients onto the Lazy SusanThe RIGHT chef prepares ingredientsThe LEFT chef cooks raw ingredientsThe BOTTOM chef serves the food to hungry customersChange selected ingredients with the D-Pad (gamepad arrow selector)Once a chef has cooked or prepared an item, activate them again to place the result back onto the Lazy SusanPay attention to your current order in the lower-left corner!
Serving the wrong dish or an ingredient will cost you money!
🤫Hints:
Try to spread ingredients out on the Lazy SusanBe mindful of clutter, don't run out of space!Try to keep your chefs busy at all timesAvocado soup must be prepared, then cookedHot dogs must be cooked, then preparedEggs and Bacon only require cookingRotate! Rotate! Rotate!
🎮Controls (gamepad-only):
XYAB - activates each corresponding chefD-Pad - selects ingredients for the TOP chef to place on the Lazy SusanRight/Left Trigger - rotates the Lazy Susan clockwise and counterclockwise
🎥Take a peek behind the scenes:
A timelapse and detailed behind-the-scenes video are in the works!

moreInfo.Author: Mark McGregor
moreInfo.Tags: chef, Cooking, Food, kitchen, overcooked, rotate, Rotation, round

If you're here, you definitely know what an office chair is. And you definitely know office chairs can spin. You've spun in one before, everyone does. 
  
And yet you can't shake this feeling: you crave more.
Gameplay

Features
